name: Zero depreciation add-on explanation
description: User asks if zero depreciation add-on is worth it

input.message: My motor insurance company offered a zero depreciation add-on for extra ₹2,000. My car is 2 years old and worth about ₹8 lakhs. Is this add-on worth buying?

notes: Zero dep covers full cost of replacement parts without depreciation deduction. For a 2-year-old ₹8L car, parts depreciate at 50%. Any major claim — the user saves thousands. ₹2K premium for this cover is typically worth it for cars < 5 years.
